name: io.github.yoda-digital/mycelium
title: Mycelium
description: End-to-end encrypted messaging between Claude Code agents over an untrusted relay.

environmentVariables.name: MYC_RELAY
environmentVariables.description: WebSocket relay URL(s), comma-separated for failover (e.g. wss://relay.example.com).

environmentVariables.name: MYC_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Relay auth token: a one-time invite for a new peer, unused once the peer authenticates with its own key.

environmentVariables.name: MYC_PEER
environmentVariables.description: This peer's unique name, permanently bound to its Ed25519 identity key on first registration.

environmentVariables.name: MYC_ROOM
environmentVariables.description: Room(s) to join, comma-separated, up to 8.

environmentVariables.name: MYC_KEY_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Path to this peer's Ed25519 identity keypair; give each peer sharing a host its own file to avoid TOFU violations.

environmentVariables.name: MYC_RELAY_FINGERPRINT
environmentVariables.description: Pinned relay fingerprint(s), comma-separated, one per relay URL, to detect a lying relay after first contact.
